title: Evaluate grapes for production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Evaluate grapes for production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect samples

pcs.text: Identify vineyard block to be sampled
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify vineyard block to be sampled?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify vineyard block to be sampled.

pcs.text: Determine optimum grape sampling time
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine optimum grape sampling time?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine optimum grape sampling time.

pcs.text: Identify and interpret standard sampling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and interpret standard sampling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and interpret standard sampling procedures.

pcs.text: Utilise vegetation indices where available to identify zones of uniformity or variation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Utilise vegetation indices where available to identify zones of uniformity or variation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Utilise vegetation indices where available to identify zones of uniformity or variation.

pcs.text: Confirm sampling areas with client or winemaker
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm sampling areas with client or winemaker?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm sampling areas with client or winemaker.

pcs.text: Observe and record out-of-specification condition or characteristics of grapes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and record out-of-specification condition or characteristics of grapes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and record out-of-specification condition or characteristics of grapes.

pcs.text: Take samples of grapes according to standard sampling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take samples of grapes according to standard sampling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take samples of grapes according to standard sampling procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Collect samples

elements.title: Process samples

pcs.text: Prepare sample processing equipment according to standard sampling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare sample processing equipment according to standard sampling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare sample processing equipment according to standard sampling procedures.

pcs.text: Extract juice using processing equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Extract juice using processing equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Extract juice using processing equipment.

pcs.text: Wash processing equipment between samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Wash processing equipment between samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wash processing equipment between samples.

pcs.text: Wash and store processing equipment after use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Wash and store processing equipment after use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Wash and store processing equipment after use.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Process samples

elements.title: Evaluate samples

pcs.text: Evaluate juice using standard organoleptic procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate juice using standard organoleptic procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate juice using standard organoleptic procedures.

pcs.text: Perform simple grape analysis procedures and record results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform simple grape analysis procedures and record results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform simple grape analysis procedures and record results.

pcs.text: Evaluate results using quantitative parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate results using quantitative parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate results using quantitative parameters.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Evaluate samples

elements.title: Taste and evaluate wine

pcs.text: Use accepted tasting procedures for tasting wine
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use accepted tasting procedures for tasting wine?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use accepted tasting procedures for tasting wine.

pcs.text: Identify the flavour and aroma components and characteristics of wine using organoleptic evaluation techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the flavour and aroma components and characteristics of wine using organoleptic evaluation techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the flavour and aroma components and characteristics of wine using organoleptic evaluation techniques.

pcs.text: Identify the relative contribution and interaction of wine components to the wine taste, aroma and appearance, using accepted wine description terminology
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the relative contribution and interaction of wine components to the wine taste, aroma and appearance, using accepted wine description terminology?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the relative contribution and interaction of wine components to the wine taste, aroma and appearance, using accepted wine description terminology.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Taste and evaluate wine

elements.title: Monitor and evaluate vineyard

pcs.text: Establish and document vineyard qualitative parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and document vineyard qualitative parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and document vineyard qualitative parameters.

pcs.text: Monitor qualitative parameters to determine harvest time for optimum wine quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor qualitative parameters to determine harvest time for optimum wine quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor qualitative parameters to determine harvest time for optimum wine quality.

pcs.text: Compare results to grape production plan schedule, and determine best course of action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare results to grape production plan schedule, and determine best course of action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare results to grape production plan schedule, and determine best course of action.

pcs.text: Identify and communicate opportunities to optimise fruit quality prior to harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and communicate opportunities to optimise fruit quality prior to harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and communicate opportunities to optimise fruit quality prior to harvest.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Monitor and evaluate vineyard

elements.title: Analyse effects in grape quality

pcs.text: Identify effects of climate on grapes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify effects of climate on grapes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify effects of climate on grapes.

pcs.text: Identify site effects on grape quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site effects on grape quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site effects on grape quality.

pcs.text: Identify and analyse effects of grape variety and flavour
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and analyse effects of grape variety and flavour?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and analyse effects of grape variety and flavour.

pcs.text: Identify and evaluate effects of vineyard management practices on grapes in terms of modifications and improvements to be made for the current and next season
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and evaluate effects of vineyard management practices on grapes in terms of modifications and improvements to be made for the current and next season?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate effects of vineyard management practices on grapes in terms of modifications and improvements to be made for the current and next season.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Analyse effects in grape quality
